text:
EXPLANATION: While the paper title is real, the cited authorship list is significantly incomplete (missing 3 authors) and the venue is incorrect (the paper was published at ICML 2019, not ICLR). Because the reference grafts the real title onto a truncated author list and incorrect venue, it is considered a hallucinated citation.

LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/1811.04551
FOUND_TITLE: NONE
FOUND_AUTHORS: NONE
FOUND_YEAR: NONE
VERDICT: LIKELY
